explanation: Insertion: Adding quotes around the argument may prevent the Sigma rule from matching the command line as the pattern is enclosed within quotes.
Substitution: Adding an optional argument (-type=SRV) changes the command line structure without altering the core suspicious pattern, potentially avoiding the Sigma rule's string match.
Reordering: Changing the order of the arguments may affect how the Sigma rule parses the command line, potentially avoiding the string match.
